title: Business Breakfast | Stock Market News | June 23, 2026 | TV5 Money

recommendations.note: Start buying in small quantities after breakout
recommendations.detail: Results were spectacular; the stock was stuck around 250 for a week to ten days, then broke out and moved from 250 to 270 in about five days. Start buying in small quantities, and you can buy aggressively closer to 250. If the June-ending quarter shows decent performance it could go to 300-plus; a large number of HNIs are now in it.

recommendations.note: Book partial profit; exit weak post-demerger entities
recommendations.detail: Sum-of-the-parts ex-demerger gives close to 20% returns (annualized close to 100%), earned just off the demerger corporate action. Do a bit of partial profit booking, leaving the extent to the holder's greed/optimism. The post-demerger entities that are weak should be exited only.

recommendations.note: Outperforming AMC, no hurry to sell
recommendations.detail: Nippon India AMC is definitely one of the outperforming AMCs, no doubt about it. Hold; there is no hurry to sell at all.

recommendations.note: Group doing extremely well; put a trading stop
recommendations.detail: As a group, both companies are doing extremely well. Put a trading stop now and hold. The precise return view depends on whether the passenger-vehicle or CV entity, and pre- vs ex-demerger shares, were bought.

recommendations.note: Good stock for a 5-10 yr plan; review quarterly
recommendations.detail: Endorsed as part of the viewer's 5-10 year list as a good stock / good selection. But markets no longer allow sitting and holding for years; review the financial performance once every three months.

recommendations.note: Good stock for a 5-10 yr plan; review quarterly
recommendations.detail: Endorsed as part of the viewer's 5-10 year list as a good stock / good selection. Keep reviewing the financial performance once every three months rather than holding blindly for years.

recommendations.note: Good stock for a 5-10 yr plan; review quarterly
recommendations.detail: Endorsed as part of the viewer's 5-10 year list as a good stock / good selection. Keep reviewing the financial performance once every three months rather than holding blindly for years.

recommendations.note: Good stock for a 5-10 yr plan; review quarterly
recommendations.detail: Endorsed as part of the viewer's 5-10 year list as a good stock / good selection. Keep reviewing the financial performance once every three months rather than holding blindly for years.

recommendations.note: Don't exit at these levels; sell near 80+
recommendations.detail: At these levels don't get out. It is not a bad stock and has subsidies and a green subsidiary, though last quarter's result was very weak; the stock bottomed at 63 and is flat. A weak monsoon is a risk for hydro-power names. If you ask him, sell near 80-plus.

recommendations.note: Stay invested (holder up 40%)
recommendations.detail: He would say stay invested in Capton. Booking profit is the holder's own individual decision; if you want to book, that is fine.

recommendations.note: Buy only for stable returns/dividend; no multibagger
recommendations.detail: Outperforming/multibagger returns from HUDCO are gone. Buy only if you specifically want stable returns and a good dividend; otherwise it is only a good stock, that's all. He doesn't expect outperforming returns from it.

recommendations.note: Hold despite high entry; excellent margins
recommendations.detail: The viewer bought a bit high at 4683 but still hold. Data Patterns and Paras Defence get on-and-off buying interest and perform strongly. Last-quarter operating profit margin was 56%, an excellent result, and the stock rose well. When buying, watch the entry point to keep the risk factor lower.

recommendations.note: Hold with trailing stop; high PE but momentum
recommendations.detail: The counter has risen a lot, seen up to 1100. It is a high-PE stock (~190) reflecting strong expectations on future growth, but momentum is there. Put a trailing stop just below 1000 and hold; there is still steam.

recommendations.note: Hold; still steam
recommendations.detail: For now hold both this and TD Power; there is still steam in both stocks.

recommendations.note: Hold (holder -25% at 935); higher-top/higher-bottom forming
recommendations.detail: After a long time some activity is seen. It fell sharply below 500 to 444, but since a good last-quarter result it is forming higher top, higher bottom. If the June-ending result is also good, it should easily reach 850-900 again. Presently hold.

recommendations.note: Recovery mode; keep a trading stop
recommendations.detail: In recovery mode. The stock touched 1000 and recently went up to 1090, now near 960. Hold, but keep a trading stop since it is in profit.

recommendations.note: Recovery mode; keep a trading stop
recommendations.detail: One of three stocks (with Orchid Pharma and Tejas Networks) in recovery mode. Hold, but keep a trading stop since it is in profit.

recommendations.note: Risen ~30% off bottom, stabilizing; trading stop
recommendations.detail: In recovery mode, risen about 30% from the bottom and stabilizing. Hold, but keep a trading stop since it is in profit.

recommendations.note: Good stock, not a bad selection
recommendations.detail: Part of a viewer's set (with Enrin, an ICICI name and JSW Infra) that he called all good stocks, not a bad selection. Definitely hold as of now.

recommendations.note: Wait; ~Rs 7000 cr rights issue coming
recommendations.detail: A fresh rights issue of around 7000 crores is coming. So wait a little before adding.

recommendations.note: Worthless penny stock; at best a lottery ticket
recommendations.detail: Called it a chaotic, wretched, worthless penny stock (~40 paise) built on bonus/split gimmicks and unverifiable announcements (a Singapore firm PAR taking a 12% stake, a Rs 500 crore project). Don't waste time or brain on it; the same money in a genuinely good stock would have done far better. At best treat it as a lottery ticket with money you can afford to lose.
